name: CubeSandbox — Create Session
description: Create a persistent CubeSandbox VM session and return its ID. Use cubesandbox_exec for one-shot execution instead. Useful when you need a long-lived sandbox across multiple tool calls.

E2B_API_URL.description: URL of the CubeSandbox API gateway

executor_template.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, os
args = json.load(sys.stdin)
timeout = args.get('timeout', 300)
os.environ['E2B_API_URL'] = '${E2B_API_URL}'
os.environ['E2B_API_KEY'] = '${E2B_API_KEY}'
try:
    from e2b_code_interpreter import Sandbox
    sbx = Sandbox(template='${CUBE_TEMPLATE_ID}', timeout=timeout)
    print(json.dumps({'success': True, 'sandbox_id': sbx.sandbox_id, 'template': '${CUBE_TEMPLATE_ID}'}))
except ImportError:
    print(json.dumps({'success': False, 'error': 'e2b_code_interpreter not installed'}))
except Exception as e:
    print(json.dumps({'success': False, 'error': str(e)}))
"
